replaceString:
<script>
(function(){
var NS='__MMS6_APP__';
var TOOLS_RETRY_MAX=80, TOOLS_RETRY_MS=120;

function bootTools(retry){
  retry=retry||0;
  function getSharedNS(){
  try{
    if(window.top){
      window.top[NS]=window.top[NS]||{};
      return window.top[NS];
    }
  }catch(_){}
  window[NS]=window[NS]||{};
  return window[NS];
}
var ns=getSharedNS();
var shell=ns.shell, coreApi=ns.coreApi;


  if(!shell||!shell.__ready||!coreApi){
    if(retry<TOOLS_RETRY_MAX){
      setTimeout(function(){ bootTools(retry+1); }, TOOLS_RETRY_MS);
      return;
    }
    console.warn('[MMS6-Tools] Shell/Core 未就绪，已放弃启动');
    return;
  }

  if(ns.tools&&ns.tools.__ready){
    try{ns.tools.notifyFreshInstance()}catch(_){}
    return;
  }

  function trim(t){return String(t==null?'':t).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g,'')}
  function arr(v){return Object.prototype.toString.call(v)==='[object Array]'}
  function int(v,d){v=parseInt(v,10);return isNaN(v)?d:v}
  function esc(t){return String(t==null?'':t).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/\"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,''')}
  function clip(t,n){t=trim(String(t==null?'':t)).replace(/\n{3,}/g,'\n\n');return !n||t.length<=n?t:trim(t.slice(0,n))+'…'}
  function uid(){return'm'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)}
  function dedupeKey(t){return trim(String(t==null?'':t).replace(/\r/g,'')).replace(/\s+/g,' ')}
  function q(sel){return shell.root?shell.root.querySelector(sel):null}
  function qa(sel){return shell.root?shell.root.querySelectorAll(sel):[]}
  function toast(t){try{if(shell&&typeof shell.showToast==='function')shell.showToast(t);else tavo.utils.toast(t)}catch(_){}}

    var tools={
    __ready:true,
    busy:false,
    lockOwner:'',
    importCandidates:[],

    checkedImports:{},
    importSourceLabel:'尚未扫描世界书',
    lastNote:'等待操作',
    form:{
      importText:'',
      quickFrom:'1',
      quickTo:'96',
      preciseFrom:'97',
      preciseTo:'124'
    }
  };
  ns.tools=tools;

    function acquireSharedLock(owner){
    owner=trim(owner||'tools');
    if(coreApi&&typeof coreApi.acquireLock==='function')return !!coreApi.acquireLock(owner);
    return !tools.busy;
  }

  function releaseSharedLock(owner){
    owner=trim(owner||'tools');
    if(coreApi&&typeof coreApi.releaseLock==='function')coreApi.releaseLock(owner);
  }

  function setBusy(on,msg,owner){
    if(on){
      owner=trim(owner||'tools');
      if(tools.busy)return false;
      if(!acquireSharedLock(owner))return false;
      tools.busy=true;
      tools.lockOwner=owner;
      shell.setPending('sync',trim(msg||'处理中…'));
      return true;
    }

    tools.busy=false;
    shell.clearPending();
    releaseSharedLock(tools.lockOwner||'tools');
    tools.lockOwner='';
    return true;
  }

  function syncFormFromDom(){
    var map={
      importText:'[data-tools-role="import-text"]',
      quickFrom:'[data-tools-role="quick-from"]',
      quickTo:'[data-tools-role="quick-to"]',
      preciseFrom:'[data-tools-role="precise-from"]',
      preciseTo:'[data-tools-role="precise-to"]'
    },k,el;
    for(k in map){
      if(!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(map,k))continue;
      el=q(map[k]);
      if(el)tools.form[k]=String(el.value||'');
    }
  }
  function setCandidates(list,label){
    tools.importCandidates=arr(list)?list:[];
    tools.checkedImports={};
    tools.importSourceLabel=label||'尚未扫描世界书';
  }
  async function refreshAll(){
    try{ if(coreApi&&typeof coreApi.renderUI==='function')await coreApi.renderUI(); }catch(e){console.error(e)}
    try{ renderTools(); }catch(e2){console.error(e2)}
  }
  async function loadState(){ return coreApi.loadState(); }
  async function saveState(s){ return coreApi.saveState(s); }
  function markUnsynced(state,reason){ if(coreApi&&typeof coreApi.markUnsynced==='function')coreApi.markUnsynced(state,reason); }
  async function trySync(state,names,forceAttach){ return coreApi.trySync(state,names,!!forceAttach); }
  async function getNames(){ return coreApi.getChatNames(); }
  async function getMessages(){ return coreApi.getAllMessages(); }
  function getAssists(msgs){ return coreApi.getAssistantSlots(msgs); }
  function rangeLabelL(a,b){ return coreApi.rangeLabelL(a,b); }
  function buildDialogue(msgs,assists,a,b,names){ return coreApi.buildDialogueByAssistantRange(msgs,assists,a,b,names); }
  function buildHistoryPrompt(state,names,win){ return coreApi.buildHistoryPrompt(state,names,win); }
  function buildStagePrompt(state,names,win){ return coreApi.buildStagePrompt(state,names,win); }
  function buildLongPrompt(state,names,list){ return coreApi.buildLongPrompt(state,names,list); }
  function extractAnchors(text){ return coreApi.extractAnchorsFromText(text); }
  function clean(t){ return coreApi.clean(t); }
  async function refreshScanHits(passive){
    if(coreApi&&typeof coreApi.refreshScanHits==='function')return coreApi.refreshScanHits(passive);
  }
  async function exportArchive(){ return coreApi.exportArchive(); }

  function parsedJsonToBasicCandidates(data){
    var out=[],i,j;
    function pushOne(title,text,sourceType,sourceLabel){
      text=trim(text||'');
      if(!text)return;
      out.push({
        key:uid(),
        title:trim(title||'导入基础记忆'),
        text:text,
        sourceType:trim(sourceType||'json'),
        sourceLabel:trim(sourceLabel||'JSON'),
        meta:'来源：'+trim(sourceLabel||'JSON')
      });
    }
    if(!data)return out;

    if(arr(data)){
      for(i=0;i<data.length;i++){
        if(typeof data[i]==='string')pushOne('JSON记忆 '+(i+1),data[i],'json','JSON数组');
        else if(data[i]&&typeof data[i]==='object'){
          if(typeof data[i].text==='string')pushOne(data[i].title||data[i].name||('记忆 '+(i+1)),data[i].text,'json','JSON条目');
          else if(typeof data[i].content==='string')pushOne(data[i].title||data[i].name||data[i].identifier||('条目 '+(i+1)),data[i].content,'json','JSON条目');
        }
      }
      return out;
    }

    if(data&&typeof data==='object'){
      if(arr(data.entries)){
        for(i=0;i<data.entries.length;i++){
          if(data.entries[i]&&typeof data.entries[i].content==='string'){
            pushOne(data.entries[i].name||data.entries[i].title||data.entries[i].identifier||('条目 '+(i+1)),data.entries[i].content,'json-lorebook',data.name||'JSON世界书');
          }
        }
        return out;
      }
      if(arr(data.memories)){
        for(i=0;i<data.memories.length;i++){
          if(typeof data.memories[i]==='string')pushOne('记忆 '+(i+1),data.memories[i],'json','memories');
          else if(data.memories[i]&&typeof data.memories[i]==='object')pushOne(data.memories[i].title||data.memories[i].name||('记忆 '+(i+1)),data.memories[i].text||data.memories[i].content||'','json','memories');
        }
        return out;
      }
      if(arr(data.basicMemories)||arr(data.seedMemories)||arr(data.stageSummaries)||arr(data.longMemories)||arr(data.historyPatches)||arr(data.historyCards)||arr(data.summaries)||arr(data.segments)){
        if(arr(data.basicMemories)){
          for(i=0;i<data.basicMemories.length;i++)pushOne(data.basicMemories[i].title||('基础记忆 '+(i+1)),data.basicMemories[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 basic');
        }
        if(arr(data.seedMemories)){
          for(i=0;i<data.seedMemories.length;i++)pushOne(data.seedMemories[i].title||('基础记忆 '+(i+1)),data.seedMemories[i].text||data.seedMemories[i].content||'','json-archive','导出档案 seed');
        }
        if(arr(data.longMemories)){
          for(i=0;i<data.longMemories.length;i++)pushOne('长期记忆 '+(i+1),data.longMemories[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 long');
        }
        if(arr(data.segments)){
          for(i=0;i<data.segments.length;i++)pushOne('长期记忆 '+(i+1),data.segments[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 segment');
        }
        if(arr(data.historyPatches)){
          for(i=0;i<data.historyPatches.length;i++)pushOne('历史补档 '+(i+1),data.historyPatches[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 history');
        }
        if(arr(data.historyCards)){
          for(i=0;i<data.historyCards.length;i++)pushOne('历史补档 '+(i+1),data.historyCards[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 history');
        }
        if(arr(data.stageSummaries)){
          for(i=0;i<data.stageSummaries.length;i++)pushOne('阶段总结 '+(i+1),data.stageSummaries[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 stage');
        }
        if(arr(data.summaries)){
          for(i=0;i<data.summaries.length;i++)pushOne('阶段总结 '+(i+1),data.summaries[i].text||'','json-archive','导出档案 summary');
        }
        return out;
      }
      for(j in data){
        if(!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(data,j))continue;
        if(typeof data[j]==='string'&&trim(data[j]).length>12)pushOne(j,data[j],'json','JSON对象');
      }
    }
    return out;
  }

  function addBasicMemories(state,list){
    list=arr(list)?list:[];
    var exists={},i,c,key,text,added=0;
    state.basicMemories=arr(state.basicMemories)?state.basicMemories:[];
    for(i=0;i<state.basicMemories.length;i++)exists[dedupeKey(state.basicMemories[i].text||'')]=1;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      c=list[i]||{};
      text=trim(c.text||'');
      if(!text)continue;
      key=dedupeKey(text);
      if(exists[key])continue;
      exists[key]=1;
      state.basicMemories.push({
        id:uid(),
        title:trim(c.title||('基础记忆 '+(state.basicMemories.length+1))),
        text:text,
        createdAt:(new Date()).toLocaleString(),
        enabled:true,
        sourceType:trim(c.sourceType||'manual'),
        sourceLabel:trim(c.sourceLabel||'')
      });
      added++;
    }
    return added;
  }

  function lorebookEntryToCandidate(lb,entry,idx){
    entry=entry||{};
    var title=trim(entry.name||entry.title||entry.identifier||('条目 '+(idx+1)));
    var text=trim(entry.content||'');
    if(!text)return null;
    return{
      key:'lb'+String(lb&&lb.id!=null?lb.id:'x')+'::'+String(entry.identifier||idx),
      title:title,
      text:text,
      sourceType:'lorebook',
      sourceLabel:trim((lb&&lb.name)||'世界书'),
      sourceId:String(lb&&lb.id!=null?lb.id:''),
      meta:'来源：'+trim((lb&&lb.name)||'世界书')+' · '+(entry.enabled===false?'未启用':'已启用')
    };
  }

  function filterOutManagedLorebooks(state,list){
    list=arr(list)?list:[];
    var out=[],seen={},i,c,key,isManaged;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      c=list[i]||{};
      isManaged=false;
      if(state.archiveLorebookId&&String(c.sourceId||'')===String(state.archiveLorebookId))isManaged=true;
      if(state.runtimeLorebookId&&String(c.sourceId||'')===String(state.runtimeLorebookId))isManaged=true;
      if(state.archiveLorebookName&&trim(c.sourceLabel||'')===trim(state.archiveLorebookName))isManaged=true;
      if(state.runtimeLorebookName&&trim(c.sourceLabel||'')===trim(state.runtimeLorebookName))isManaged=true;
      if(isManaged)continue;
      key=(c.sourceId||'')+'::'+dedupeKey(c.text||'');
      if(seen[key])continue;
      seen[key]=1;
      out.push(c);
    }
    return out;
  }

    async function scanAttached(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在扫描已挂世界书…','tools:scanAttached')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      var state=await loadState(),chat=await tavo.chat.current(),list=[],i,lbRef,lb,entries,j,c;
      if(chat&&arr(chat.lorebooks)){
        for(i=0;i<chat.lorebooks.length;i++){
          lbRef=chat.lorebooks[i];
          if(!lbRef||lbRef.id==null)continue;
          try{
            lb=await tavo.lorebook.get(lbRef.id);
            entries=arr(lb&&lb.entries)?lb.entries:[];
            for(j=0;j<entries.length;j++){
              c=lorebookEntryToCandidate(lb,entries[j],j);
              if(c)list.push(c);
            }
          }catch(e1){console.error(e1)}
        }
      }
      list=filterOutManagedLorebooks(state,list);
      setCandidates(list,'来源：当前聊天已挂世界书 ｜ 共 '+list.length+' 条候选（默认未勾选）');
      tools.lastNote='已扫描当前聊天已挂世界书';
      toast(list.length?('已扫描到 '+list.length+' 条候选'):'未扫描到可导入条目');
      renderTools();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('扫描失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

    async function scanAllLorebooks(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在扫描全部世界书…','tools:scanAllLorebooks')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      var state=await loadState(),all=await tavo.lorebook.all(),list=[],i,lb,entries,j,c;
      all=arr(all)?all:[];
      for(i=0;i<all.length;i++){
        if(!all[i]||all[i].id==null)continue;
        try{
          lb=await tavo.lorebook.get(all[i].id);
          entries=arr(lb&&lb.entries)?lb.entries:[];
          for(j=0;j<entries.length;j++){
            c=lorebookEntryToCandidate(lb,entries[j],j);
            if(c)list.push(c);
          }
        }catch(e1){console.error(e1)}
      }
      list=filterOutManagedLorebooks(state,list);
      setCandidates(list,'来源：全部世界书 ｜ 共 '+list.length+' 条候选（默认未勾选）');
      tools.lastNote='已扫描全部世界书';
      toast(list.length?('已扫描到 '+list.length+' 条候选'):'未扫描到可导入条目');
      renderTools();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('扫描失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

    async function importText(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在导入基础记忆…','tools:importText')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      syncFormFromDom();
      var text=trim(tools.form.importText||'');
      if(!text){toast('请先输入要导入的文本');return;}
      var state=await loadState(),names=await getNames();
      var added=addBasicMemories(state,[{title:'导入基础记忆',text:text,sourceType:'manual',sourceLabel:'文本粘贴'}]);
      if(!added){toast('相同内容已存在，未重复导入');return;}
      markUnsynced(state,'新增基础记忆');
      await saveState(state);
      try{await trySync(state,names,false);}catch(e){console.error(e)}
      tools.form.importText='';
      tools.lastNote='已导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆';
      toast('已导入基础记忆');
      await refreshAll();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('导入失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

    async function importJsonText(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在解析 JSON…','tools:importJsonText')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      syncFormFromDom();
      var raw=trim(tools.form.importText||'');
      if(!raw){toast('请先粘贴 JSON 内容');return;}
      var data=JSON.parse(raw),cands=parsedJsonToBasicCandidates(data);
      if(!cands.length){toast('这个 JSON 没识别到可导入的基础记忆');return;}
      var state=await loadState(),names=await getNames(),added=addBasicMemories(state,cands);
      if(!added){toast('JSON 中可导入内容已存在，未重复写入');return;}
      markUnsynced(state,'新增基础记忆');
      await saveState(state);
      try{await trySync(state,names,false);}catch(e){console.error(e)}
      tools.form.importText='';
      tools.lastNote='已从 JSON 文本导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆';
      toast('已导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆');
      await refreshAll();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('JSON 文本导入失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

    async function readJsonFile(file){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在读取 JSON 文件…','tools:readJsonFile')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      var txt=await new Promise(function(resolve,reject){
        try{
          var reader=new FileReader();
          reader.onload=function(){resolve(String(reader.result||''));};
          reader.onerror=function(){reject(new Error('文件读取失败'));};
          reader.readAsText(file,'utf-8');
        }catch(e){reject(e);}
      });
      var data=JSON.parse(txt),cands=parsedJsonToBasicCandidates(data);
      if(!cands.length){toast('这个 JSON 没识别到可导入的基础记忆');return;}
      var state=await loadState(),names=await getNames(),added=addBasicMemories(state,cands);
      if(!added){toast('JSON 中可导入内容已存在，未重复写入');return;}
      markUnsynced(state,'新增基础记忆');
      await saveState(state);
      try{await trySync(state,names,false);}catch(e){console.error(e)}
      tools.lastNote='已从 JSON 文件导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆';
      toast('已导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆');
      await refreshAll();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('JSON 文件导入失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

  function pickJsonFile(){
    var inp=q('[data-tools-role="json-file"]');
    if(!inp){toast('当前环境不支持文件导入');return;}
    inp.click();
  }

    async function importChecked(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在导入勾选条目…','tools:importChecked')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      var selected=[],i,c,state,names,added;
      for(i=0;i<tools.importCandidates.length;i++){
        c=tools.importCandidates[i];
        if(tools.checkedImports[c.key])selected.push(c);
      }
      if(!selected.length){toast('请先勾选要导入的条目');return;}
      state=await loadState();
      names=await getNames();
      added=addBasicMemories(state,selected);
      if(!added){toast('勾选条目已全部存在，未重复导入');return;}
      markUnsynced(state,'新增基础记忆');
      await saveState(state);
      try{await trySync(state,names,false);}catch(e){console.error(e)}
      tools.lastNote='已导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆';
      toast('已导入 '+added+' 条基础记忆');
      await refreshAll();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('导入勾选条目失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

  function clearCandidates(){
    setCandidates([], '尚未扫描世界书');
    tools.lastNote='已清空扫描结果';
    renderTools();
  }

  function splitLargeRange(fromL,toL,targetL,minL,maxL){
    fromL=Math.max(1,int(fromL,1));
    toL=Math.max(fromL,int(toL,fromL));
    targetL=Math.max(20,int(targetL,100));
    minL=Math.max(10,int(minL,40));
    maxL=Math.max(minL,int(maxL,140));
    var out=[],cursor=fromL,end;
    while(cursor<=toL){
      end=Math.min(toL,cursor+targetL-1);
      if(end-cursor+1<minL&&out.length){
        out[out.length-1].assistantTo=toL;
        break;
      }
      if(end-cursor+1>maxL)end=cursor+maxL-1;
      out.push({assistantFrom:cursor,assistantTo:end});
      cursor=end+1;
    }
    if(out.length>1){
      var last=out[out.length-1],prev=out[out.length-2];
      if(last&&prev&&(last.assistantTo-last.assistantFrom+1)<minL){
        prev.assistantTo=last.assistantTo;
        out.pop();
      }
    }
    return out;
  }

  function splitPreciseRange(fromL,toL,stageEveryL){
    fromL=Math.max(1,int(fromL,1));
    toL=Math.max(fromL,int(toL,fromL));
    stageEveryL=Math.max(1,int(stageEveryL,24));
    var out=[],cursor=fromL,end;
    while(cursor<=toL){
      end=Math.min(toL,cursor+stageEveryL-1);
      out.push({assistantFrom:cursor,assistantTo:end});
      cursor=end+1;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function rangeOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){
    return Math.max(int(a1,0),int(b1,0))<=Math.min(int(a2,0),int(b2,0));
  }
  function markRangeRefined(state,fromL,toL,label){
    state.refinedRanges=arr(state.refinedRanges)?state.refinedRanges:[];
    state.historyPatches=arr(state.historyPatches)?state.historyPatches:[];
    state.refinedRanges.push({assistantFrom:fromL,assistantTo:toL,createdAt:(new Date()).toLocaleString(),source:trim(label||rangeLabelL(fromL,toL))});
    var i,h;
    for(i=0;i<state.historyPatches.length;i++){
      h=state.historyPatches[i];
      if(!h)continue;
      if(rangeOverlap(fromL,toL,h.assistantFrom,h.assistantTo)){
        h.status='refined';
        h.refinedBy=trim(label||rangeLabelL(fromL,toL));
      }
    }
  }

    async function quickBackfill(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在进行快速补档…','tools:quickBackfill')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      syncFormFromDom();
      var state=await loadState(),names=await getNames(),msgs=await getMessages(),assists=getAssists(msgs);
      var totalA=assists.length;
      var fromL=Math.max(1,int(tools.form.quickFrom,1));
      var toL=Math.max(fromL,int(tools.form.quickTo,totalA||fromL));
      if(toL>totalA)toL=totalA;
      if(fromL>toL){toast('快速补档范围无效');return;}
      if(!totalA){toast('当前聊天里没有可处理角色回复');return;}

      var ranges=splitLargeRange(fromL,toL,state.coarseTargetL,state.coarseMinL,state.coarseMaxL);
      if(!ranges.length){toast('指定范围内没有可补档内容');return;}

      var i,win,prompt,text,rec,count=0;
      for(i=0;i<ranges.length;i++){
        win=buildDialogue(msgs,assists,ranges[i].assistantFrom,ranges[i].assistantTo,names);
        if(!win||!trim(win.dialogue))continue;
        prompt=buildHistoryPrompt(state,names,win);
        text=clean(await tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false}));
        if(!text)throw new Error('历史补档结果为空（块 '+(i+1)+'）');
        rec={
          id:uid(),
          assistantFrom:ranges[i].assistantFrom,
          assistantTo:ranges[i].assistantTo,
          messageFromId:win.messageFromId,
          messageToId:win.messageToId,
          createdAt:(new Date()).toLocaleString(),
          anchors:extractAnchors(text),
          text:text,
          promptUsed:state.debugStorePrompts?prompt:'',
          status:'active',
          refinedBy:''
        };
        state.historyPatches.push(rec);
        count++;
      }

      if(!count){toast('指定范围内没有生成任何补档');return;}
      markUnsynced(state,'新增 '+count+' 条历史补档');
      await saveState(state);
      try{await trySync(state,names,false);}catch(e){console.error(e)}
      try{if(state.scanMemoryDetails)await refreshScanHits(false);}catch(e2){console.error(e2)}
      tools.lastNote='快速补档完成：新增 '+count+' 条历史补档';
      toast('快速补档完成：新增 '+count+' 条历史补档');
      await refreshAll();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('快速补档失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

    async function preciseBackfill(){
    if(!setBusy(true,'正在进行精准补档…','tools:preciseBackfill')){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return;}
    try{

      syncFormFromDom();
      var state=await loadState(),names=await getNames(),msgs=await getMessages(),assists=getAssists(msgs),totalA=assists.length;
      var fromL=Math.max(1,int(tools.form.preciseFrom,1));
      var toL=Math.max(fromL,int(tools.form.preciseTo,totalA||fromL));
      if(toL>totalA)toL=totalA;
      if(fromL>toL){toast('精准补档范围无效');return;}
      if(!totalA){toast('当前聊天里没有可处理角色回复');return;}

      var stageRanges=splitPreciseRange(fromL,toL,state.stageEveryL),newStages=[],newLongs=[],i,win,prompt,text,stageRec,group,longRec;
      for(i=0;i<stageRanges.length;i++){
        win=buildDialogue(msgs,assists,stageRanges[i].assistantFrom,stageRanges[i].assistantTo,names);
        if(!win||!trim(win.dialogue))continue;
        prompt=buildStagePrompt(state,names,win);
        text=clean(await tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false}));
        if(!text)throw new Error('精准补档阶段总结结果为空（块 '+(i+1)+'）');
        stageRec={
          id:uid(),
          assistantFrom:stageRanges[i].assistantFrom,
          assistantTo:stageRanges[i].assistantTo,
          messageFromId:win.messageFromId,
          messageToId:win.messageToId,
          createdAt:(new Date()).toLocaleString(),
          anchors:extractAnchors(text),
          text:text,
          promptUsed:state.debugStorePrompts?prompt:'',
          sourceMode:'backfill-fine'
        };
        state.stageSummaries.push(stageRec);
        newStages.push(stageRec);
      }

      var longNeed=Math.max(1,int(state.longEveryStage,4));
      for(i=0;i+longNeed<=newStages.length;i+=longNeed){
        group=newStages.slice(i,i+longNeed);
        prompt=buildLongPrompt(state,names,group);
        text=clean(await tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false}));
        if(!text)throw new Error('精准补档长期记忆结果为空（组 '+((i/longNeed)+1)+'）');
        longRec={
          id:uid(),
          assistantFrom:int(group[0].assistantFrom,0),
          assistantTo:int(group[group.length-1].assistantTo,0),
          summaryFrom:0,
          summaryTo:0,
          createdAt:(new Date()).toLocaleString(),
          anchors:extractAnchors(text),
          text:text,
          promptUsed:state.debugStorePrompts?prompt:'',
          sourceMode:'backfill-fine'
        };
        state.longMemories.push(longRec);
        newLongs.push(longRec);
      }

      markRangeRefined(state,fromL,toL,'precise:'+rangeLabelL(fromL,toL));
      markUnsynced(state,'精准补档新增 '+newStages.length+' 条阶段总结，'+newLongs.length+' 条长期记忆');
      await saveState(state);
      try{await trySync(state,names,false);}catch(e){console.error(e)}
      try{if(state.scanMemoryDetails)await refreshScanHits(false);}catch(e2){console.error(e2)}
      tools.lastNote='精准补档完成：新增 '+newStages.length+' 条阶段总结，'+newLongs.length+' 条长期记忆';
      toast('精准补档完成：新增 '+newStages.length+' 条总结，'+newLongs.length+' 条长期记忆');
      await refreshAll();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('精准补档失败：'+clip(e&&e.message||String(e),120));
    }finally{
      setBusy(false,'');
    }
  }

  function renderCandidateListHTML(){
    if(!tools.importCandidates.length){
      return '<div class="mms6-note">暂无扫描结果。可扫描当前聊天已挂世界书或全部世界书。扫描结果默认全部不勾选。</div>';
    }
    var html=['<div class="mms6-check-list">'],i,c,checked;
    for(i=0;i<tools.importCandidates.length;i++){
      c=tools.importCandidates[i];
      checked=!!tools.checkedImports[c.key];
      html.push(
        '<label class="mms6-check-item">' +
          '<input type="checkbox" data-tools-role="candidate-check" data-key="'+esc(c.key)+'"'+(checked?' checked':'')+'>' +
          '<div>' +
            '<div class="mms6-row-label">'+esc(c.title||('条目 '+(i+1)))+'</div>' +
            '<div class="mms6-field-note">'+esc(c.meta||'')+'</div>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</label>'
      );
    }
    html.push('</div>');
    return html.join('');
  }

  function buildToolsHTML(){
    return [
      '<div class="mms6-card">',
        '<div class="mms6-card-head"><div><div class="mms6-card-title">导入基础记忆</div><div class="mms6-card-sub">这里的 JSON 导入文案明确是“导入为基础记忆”，避免误以为恢复完整档案。</div></div></div>',
        '<div class="mms6-field"><label>导入为基础记忆</label><textarea class="mms6-area" style="min-height:140px;" data-tools-role="import-text" placeholder="可粘贴纯文本，或粘贴 JSON 文本。">'+esc(tools.form.importText||'')+'</textarea><div class="mms6-field-note">支持：导入文本 / 导入 JSON 文本 / 选择 JSON 文件</div></div>',
        '<input type="file" accept=".json,application/json" data-tools-role="json-file" style="display:none;">',
        '<div class="mms6-actions">',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-primary" data-action="importText"><span>导入文本</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">基础记忆</span></button>',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-ghost" data-action="importJsonText"><span>导入 JSON 文本</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">基础记忆</span></button>',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-ghost" data-action="pickJsonFile"><span>选择 JSON 文件</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">基础记忆</span></button>',
        '</div>',
      '</div>',

      '<div class="mms6-card">',
        '<div class="mms6-card-head"><div><div class="mms6-card-title">扫描世界书导入</div><div class="mms6-card-sub">扫描结果默认全部不勾选，用户自行选择后再导入。</div></div></div>',
        '<div class="mms6-actions" style="margin-bottom:10px;">',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-ghost" data-action="scanAttached"><span>扫描已挂世界书</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">默认不勾选</span></button>',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-ghost" data-action="scanAllLorebooks"><span>扫描全部世界书</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">默认不勾选</span></button>',
        '</div>',
        '<div class="mms6-inline-note">'+esc(tools.importSourceLabel||'尚未扫描世界书')+'</div>',
        renderCandidateListHTML(),
        '<div class="mms6-actions" style="margin-top:10px;">',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-primary" data-action="importChecked"><span>导入勾选条目</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">基础记忆</span></button>',
          '<button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-ghost" data-action="clearCandidates"><span>清空扫描结果</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">重置选择</span></button>',
        '</div>',
      '</div>',

      '<div class="mms6-card">',
        '<div class="mms6-card-head"><div><div class="mms6-card-title">快速补档</div><div class="mms6-card-sub">按较大范围快速整理旧聊天，产物写入“历史补档”，不影响当前自动运行进度。</div></div><span class="mms6-pill">API 多次</span></div>',
        '<div class="mms6-grid-2">',
          '<div class="mms6-field"><label>起始 L</label><input class="mms6-input" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="'+esc(tools.form.quickFrom||'1')+'" data-tools-role="quick-from"></div>',
          '<div class="mms6-field"><label>结束 L</label><input class="mms6-input" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="'+esc(tools.form.quickTo||'96')+'" data-tools-role="quick-to"></div>',
        '</div>',
        '<div class="mms6-note">适合先把长历史整理进档案。只会写入“历史补档”，不会额外生成当前状态类内容。</div>',
        '<div class="mms6-actions" style="margin-top:10px;"><button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-primary" data-action="quickBackfill"><span>开始快速补档</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">消耗 API：多次</span></button></div>',
      '</div>',

      '<div class="mms6-card">',
        '<div class="mms6-card-head"><div><div class="mms6-card-title">精准补档</div><div class="mms6-card-sub">按正常规则处理指定历史范围，生成阶段总结和长期记忆，但不影响当前自动运行进度。</div></div><span class="mms6-pill">API 多次</span></div>',
        '<div class="mms6-grid-2">',
          '<div class="mms6-field"><label>起始 L</label><input class="mms6-input" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="'+esc(tools.form.preciseFrom||'97')+'" data-tools-role="precise-from"></div>',
          '<div class="mms6-field"><label>结束 L</label><input class="mms6-input" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="'+esc(tools.form.preciseTo||'124')+'" data-tools-role="precise-to"></div>',
        '</div>',
        '<div class="mms6-note">阶段总结部分使用“阶段总结提示词”，长期记忆部分使用“长期记忆提示词”。产物可查看、可删除、可参与扫描记忆细节，但不会推进当前自动进度。</div>',
        '<div class="mms6-actions" style="margin-top:10px;"><button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-primary" data-action="preciseBackfill"><span>开始精准补档</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">预计消耗 API：多次</span></button></div>',
      '</div>',

      '<div class="mms6-card">',
        '<div class="mms6-card-head"><div><div class="mms6-card-title">导出档案</div><div class="mms6-card-sub">导出当前正式版 V6 档案。</div></div></div>',
        '<div class="mms6-actions"><button type="button" class="mms6-btn mms6-ghost" data-action="exportArchive"><span>导出档案</span><span class="mms6-btn-meta">JSON</span></button></div>',
        '<div class="mms6-inline-note" style="margin-top:10px;">'+esc(tools.lastNote||'等待操作')+'</div>',
      '</div>'
    ].join('');
  }

  function bindFileInput(){
    var inp=q('[data-tools-role="json-file"]');
    if(!inp||inp.getAttribute('data-file-bound')==='1')return;
    inp.setAttribute('data-file-bound','1');
    inp.addEventListener('change',function(ev){
      var file=ev&&ev.target&&ev.target.files&&ev.target.files[0]?ev.target.files[0]:null;
      if(!file)return;
      readJsonFile(file);
      try{inp.value='';}catch(_){}
    });
  }

  function bindInputs(){
    var inputs=qa('[data-tools-role="import-text"],[data-tools-role="quick-from"],[data-tools-role="quick-to"],[data-tools-role="precise-from"],[data-tools-role="precise-to"]'),i,el;
    for(i=0;i<inputs.length;i++){
      el=inputs[i];
      if(el.getAttribute('data-bound')==='1')continue;
      el.setAttribute('data-bound','1');
      el.addEventListener('input',syncFormFromDom);
      el.addEventListener('change',syncFormFromDom);
    }
    var checks=qa('[data-tools-role="candidate-check"]');
    for(i=0;i<checks.length;i++){
      el=checks[i];
      if(el.getAttribute('data-check-bound')==='1')continue;
      el.setAttribute('data-check-bound','1');
      el.addEventListener('change',function(ev){
        var key=String(ev.target.getAttribute('data-key')||'');
        tools.checkedImports[key]=!!ev.target.checked;
      });
    }
    bindFileInput();
  }

  function renderTools(){
    shell.setSlotHTML('tools',buildToolsHTML());
    bindInputs();
  }

  tools.notifyFreshInstance=function(){
    try{ renderTools(); }catch(e){ console.error(e); }
  };

  shell.registerAction('importText',importText);
  shell.registerAction('importJsonText',importJsonText);
  shell.registerAction('pickJsonFile',pickJsonFile);
  shell.registerAction('scanAttached',scanAttached);
  shell.registerAction('scanAllLorebooks',scanAllLorebooks);
  shell.registerAction('importChecked',importChecked);
  shell.registerAction('clearCandidates',clearCandidates);
  shell.registerAction('quickBackfill',quickBackfill);
  shell.registerAction('preciseBackfill',preciseBackfill);

  shell.on('open',function(){ renderTools(); });
  shell.on('tab',function(payload){ if(payload&&payload.tab==='tools')renderTools(); });

  renderTools();
}

bootTools(0);
})();
</script>
